free_text: Inclusive proton production cross sections in (d,xp)
R1. 500 mu-m Si detector and 76 mm diameter x 127 mm
R2. 100 and 1000 mu-m Si detectors and 76 mm diameter
R3. 300 mu-m Si detector and 13.5 mm square x 80 mm
solid angles and angular offset of beam
identification, dead time, target contaminants etc.)
SD: in Subent 010 data for ang. 15. degr.
During the offline data analysis we discovered that
the lead target showed signs of oxygen contamination.
At higher energies, Ep > 16 MeV, the contribution from
oxygen in the proton yield decreases to less than 10%.
affected by oxidization of the target. The change in
the target thickness results in uncertainties of up
to 50% in the absolute cross section values.
SD: Data for ang. 15. degr. were corrected.
Data received from Dr. D. Ridikas
